name: Feature Request / Permintaan Fitur

**English / Indonesia** (isi salah satu)

### Is your feature request related to a problem? / Apakah fitur ini terkait masalah?
A clear description of the problem. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

### Describe the solution / Deskripsi solusi
A clear description of what you want to happen.

### Describe alternatives / Alternatif
Other solutions or features you've considered.

### Additional context / Konteks tambahan
Any other context or screenshots.
